title: viscum coloratum f. lutescens
intro: Viscum coloratum f. lutescens, also known as Chinese mistletoe or yellow mistletoe, is a plant species that belongs to the family Santalaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as cancer, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Viscum coloratum f. lutescens include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antitumor activity, which has led to its use in complementary cancer therapy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
